Permissions
Admin users always have full access regardless of these settings. For Account Managers, uncheck items to remove access. Report access is off by default — grant reports individually as needed.

New Hire Report — Unfiled
Shows all employees whose new hire report has not yet been printed & filed
Click Generate Report to load all employees whose new hire report has not yet been filed.
State New Hire Reporting — Fax Reference
Source: U.S. Dept. of Health & Human Services, Office of Child Support Enforcement (2025)
StateFax NumberPhoneDeadlineEmail / Website
📬 Postage Reports
Postage by Client
Custom date range summary
Last run: never
Postage by Account Manager
Previous month totals
Click "Run Report" to generate.
👥 Client Reports
Clients by Account Manager
Clients by Service
Clients by Entity Type
Clients by Status
Full Client Summary
Business NameEntityServicesStatusStateAccount ManagerClient Since
📋 Compliance Reports
Biennial Report Filing List
Clients with a Biennial Report Filing ID on file, grouped by Even / Odd year cycle
Click Run Report to generate the biennial filing list.
🏦 ACH Collections
ARK Bank Settings — Farmers & Merchants Bank
ODFI originator info written into every NACHA file header
▾
EIN with 1 prefix, or assigned by bank
Usually same as ODFI routing
Shows on client's bank statement (max 10 chars)
✓ Settings saved
Generate ACH Collection File
Upload a QBO billing export CSV, match to clients, and download a NACHA .ach file
📂
Click or drag & drop a QBO billing export CSV
Expected CSV columns: Customer Name (billing name), Amount — any QBO invoice/payment export with these two columns will work. Extra columns are ignored.
The date you want the bank to post the ACH debits.
Include QBO Billing Name Amount Matched Client Bank Routing Account Status

Tax Center

      
Manage filings, corrections, and compliance across all tax modules

    


    


      
      

        
📋

        
1099 Center

        
Manage 1099-NEC, 1099-MISC, and 1099-INT entries. Maintain your vendor library and generate eFileMyForms-ready exports.

        

        

          1099-NEC
          1099-MISC
          1099-INT
          eFile Export
          Vendor Library
        

        
Open 1099 Center →

      


      
      

        
🧾

        
Sales Tax Center

        
Track client sales tax filing info, back-calculate taxable sales from PBi exports, and run the Scooters Coffee tax calculator.

        

        

          Client Filing Info
          Scooters Calculator
          Back-Calculation
        

        
Open Sales Tax Center →

      


      
      

        
🗂

        
W-2 Center

        
Enter and manage employee W-2 records for all active clients. Generate SSA-compliant EFW2 and EFW2C files for original filings and corrections.

        

        

          W-2 Entries
          W-2c Corrections
          EFW2 Export
          EFW2C Export
          Export Log
        

        
Open W-2 Center →

      



      
      

        
🏛

        
EFTPS Payment Builder

        
Generate EFTPS Batch Provider import files for ES estimated tax payments and ad-hoc 941/940 deposits. Schedule monthly payments across remaining months of the tax year.

        

        

          ES Scheduler
          Ad-Hoc 941/940
          Batch Import File
          Payment Log
        

        
Open EFTPS Builder →

      


      
      

        
📋

        
W-9 Generator

        
Search a client and instantly generate a pre-filled W-9 form from CRM data. Print or download as PDF.

        

        

          Auto-Fill from CRM
          Print / PDF
          All Entity Types
        

        
Open W-9 Generator →

      


      
      

        
💼

        
QBO Integration Center

        
Push journal entries and expenses to QuickBooks Online. Multi-company support with OAuth 2.0 — sandbox and production environments.

        

        

          Journal Entry Builder
          Expense Push
          Multi-Company
          Activity Log
        

        
Open QBO Center →

      


    


    
    

      
Key Filing Deadlines — Federal

      

        
Jan 31W-2s to employees & SSA

        
Jan 311099-NEC to recipients & IRS

        
Feb 281099-MISC paper filing (IRS)

        
Mar 311099-MISC e-file (IRS)

        
Apr 15Individual income tax (Form 1040)

        
Apr 15S-Corp & Partnership extensions

        
Mar 15S-Corp / Partnership returns

        
Sep 15Extended S-Corp / Partnership

        
Oct 15Extended individual returns

        
Quarterly941 payroll tax deposits

EFW2 Export — W-2 Original Filing

            
SSA fixed-width format · one .txt file per client · upload to SSA Business Services Online

          

          

            
            
            
          

        

        
Select a tax year and click Generate EFW2.

      


      
      

        

          

            
EFW2C Export — W-2c Correction Filing

            
Requires WFID from original filing · one .txt file per client/WFID combination

          

          

            
            
            
          

        

        
Select a tax year and click Generate EFW2C. WFID must be set on each W-2c entry.

        Click "Load" to fetch bills from QBO
        
              
        
            
        
            
            
        
              
        
                
                
                
                
              
        
              
        
              
        
                
        Click "Run Report" to fetch AP aging

        Client Search
        
          
        
          
        
            
            
        
            
        
              Type to search clients
            
        
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        

        
        
        
          
        📋
        
          
        No client selected
        
          
        Search and select a client to generate their W-9
        
        
        

        
        
        

          
          
        
            
        —
        
            
        
              
              
            
        
          
        

          
          
        

            
            
        
              
        
                
        Form W-9
        
                
        (Rev. March 2024)
        Department of the Treasury
        Internal Revenue Service
        
              
        
              
        
                
        Request for Taxpayer
        
                
        Identification Number and Certification
        
                
        Go to www.irs.gov/FormW9 for instructions and the latest information.
        
              
        
              
        
                
        OMB No. 1545-0003
        
              
        
            
        

            
        

            
            
        
              
        1 Name (as shown on your income tax return). Name is required on this line; do not leave this line blank.
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              
        2 Business name/disregarded entity name, if different from above
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                
        3a Check appropriate box for federal tax classification of the person whose name is entered on line 1. Check only one of the following seven boxes.
        
                
        
                  
                
        
              
        
              
        
                
        4 Exemptions (codes apply only to certain entities, not individuals)
        
                
        Exempt payee code (if any)
        
                
        
                
        Exemption from FATCA reporting code (if any)
        
                
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              3b If on line 3a you checked "Partnership" or "Trust/estate," or checked "LLC" and entered "P" or "S" or "C" in the space, check the appropriate checkbox: C C corporation, S S corporation, P Partnership
            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                
        5 Address (number, street, and apt. or suite no.)
        
                
        
              
        
              
        
                
        6 City, state, and ZIP code
        
                
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              
        7 List account number(s) here (optional)
        
              
        
            
        

            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                
        Part I — Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN)
        
                
        Enter your TIN in the appropriate box. The TIN provided must match the name given on line 1 to avoid backup withholding.
        
                
        
                  
        
                    
        Social security number
        
                    
        
                      
        
                    
        
                  
        
                  
        
                    
        Employer identification number
        
                    
        
                  
        
                
        
              
        
              
        
                
        Part II — Certification
        
                
        Under penalties of perjury, I certify that: 1. The number shown on this form is my correct taxpayer identification number; 2. I am not subject to backup withholding; 3. I am a U.S. citizen or other U.S. person; 4. The FATCA code(s) entered (if any) indicating I am exempt from FATCA reporting is correct.
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              
        
                
        
                  
        Signature of U.S. person ▶
        
                  
        
                  
        Signature
        
                
        
                
        
                  
        Date ▶
        
                  
        
                  
        Date
        
                
        
              
        
            
        

            
            
        
              General Instruction: Section references are to the Internal Revenue Code unless otherwise noted. For the latest information about developments related to Form W-9 and its instructions, go to www.irs.gov/FormW9.
            
        

          
        

          
          
        
            
        
              
        Override / Edit Fields
        
              
        Changes here update the form above only — not saved to CRM
        
            
        
            
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        

              
              
        
                
                
        
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                  
                
        
              
        

              
              
        
                
                
              
        
              
        
                
                
              
        

            
        
          
        

        
        
      
        
    
        

  
        


  
        

    
    
        
      
        
        
        Client Import Wizard
        
        
        Upload a CSV · AI maps your columns · you review and approve · clients load into ARK
        
      
        
      
    
        

    
    
        
      🔒
      
        
        Security reminder: Do not include EINs, SSNs, bank account numbers, routing numbers, passwords, or EFTPS PINs in your import file. Those fields are entered manually through the client record after import. Your file is read entirely in your browser — it never leaves your machine.

              Onboarding Progress
              0%
            
        
            
        
              
        
            
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
            Items are saved automatically with the client record. Service-specific items appear based on the services selected on the Business tab.

            🏛 EFTPS enrollment data for this client. SSN and PIN are stored encrypted in your local database and never transmitted except inside the generated EFTPS import file.

        Services Included
        
        
        
          
          
        
            ALWAYS INCLUDED
            Weekly Bookkeeping · Bank/CC/Loan Reconciliations · GL Management · Year-end Close · Workpapers · Audit Support
          
        
          
        
            ALWAYS INCLUDED
            Month-End Reviews · Financials Presentation · Short & Long-term Forecasting · Financial Strategy · Coordination with Professionals · Budgeting · Capitalization

        Employee Information
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        
      
        
        
        Federal Wages & Withholding
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        
      
        
        
        Box 12 — Codes (up to 4 entries)
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        
      
        
        
        
          
        Box 13 — Checkboxes
        
          
        
            
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        Box 14 — Other
        
          
        
        
      
        
      
        
        
        State / Local — Boxes 15–20
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        
      
      
        
    
        
    
        
      
      
    
        
  
        

        



        
  
        
    
        
      
        ✏️ Add W-2c Correction
        
      
    
        
    
        

      
      
        
        ⚠ A W-2c corrects a previously filed W-2. The WFID from your original SSA filing (shown on your Resubmission Notice) is required to generate a valid EFW2C file. Leave any field blank if it is not being corrected.
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
          
        
        
        
          
        
        
        
          
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        Employee — Previously Filed Name & SSN
        
        
        Enter the name/SSN as it appeared on the original W-2 that needs correcting.
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
        Corrected Name / SSN (fill only if name or SSN is being corrected)
        
          
        
            
        
            
        
            
        
            
        
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        Federal Wage & Tax Boxes — Previously Reported vs Correct Amount
        
        
        
          
        
          
        Previously Reported
        
          
        Correct Amount
        
          
        Box 1 — Wages, tips
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 2 — Fed income tax W/H
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 3 — Social security wages
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 4 — SS tax withheld
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 5 — Medicare wages
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 6 — Medicare tax W/H
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 7 — SS tips
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 8 — Allocated tips
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 10 — Dependent care
        
          
        
          
        
          
        Box 11 — Nonqualified plans
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        Box 12 Corrections — Previously Reported vs Correct (up to 4 codes)
        
        
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
          
        
            
            
            
            
            
            
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
          
        Box 13 — Corrected Checkboxes
        
          
        Check boxes that should be checked on the corrected W-2c. Leave unchecked if no change.
        
          
        
            
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
        
          
        Box 14 — Other (corrected)
        
          
        Enter corrected Box 14 items. Leave blank if not correcting.
        
          
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        State / Local Boxes 15–20 Correction
        
        
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
    
        
    
        
      
      
    
        
  
        

        
  






        
  
        
    
        
      
        
        
        
          🌙
          
        
            
        After-Hours Punch
        
            
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
          This punch is outside normal hours (before 6 AM or after 5 PM). Please tell us what you're working on.
        
        
      
        
      
    
        
    
        

      
      
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
      
        

      
        

    
        
    
        
      
      
    
        
  
        

        




        
  
        
    
        
      
        
        
        📥 Import from Todoist
        
        
        Import from Todoist — single project or full backup with multiple projects.
        
      
        
      
    
        
    
        

      
      
        
        
        How to export from Todoist
        
        
          
          
        1. In Todoist, go to Settings → Backups → Create backup
          2. 
          
        2. Download and extract the ZIP file
          3. 
          
        3. Click "Or upload file" and select all the CSV files from the backup folder
          4. 
          
        4. Map each project to a client, then preview and import
          5. 
        
        
        
        Or paste a single project CSV below for quick import.
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
          
          
        
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
            
        
              
              
        
              
            
        
            
        
              
              
            
        
          
        
          
        
            
            
          
        
          
        
            
            
          
        
        
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
          
        
            
        Map Projects to Clients
        
            
        Assign each Todoist project to an ARK client
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
          
        
        
      
        

      
      
        
        
        
          
        
            
        Preview
        
            
        
          
        
          
        
        
        
        
        
        
          
        
            
              
        
                
                  
                
                Task Name
                Due Date
                Priority
                Notes
                Status
